notes: name uniqueness duoc check case-insensitive o runtime.
currency duoc trim + upper-case truoc khi luu.
priceMonthly/priceYearly = 0 hop le va co nghia plan free cho chu ky do.
priceMonthly/priceYearly = null co nghia chu ky do khong duoc ho tro.

properties: id: Guid? null cho item moi
notes: limitType dung JsonStringEnumConverter rieng, allowIntegerValues = false.
Neu isUnlimited = true, backend se tu set limitValue = null truoc khi save.
Moi limitType chi duoc xuat hien 1 lan trong cung mot plan.
limits duoc map tu query rieng va khong co order guarantee.
Response khong co thong tin subscriber count hay usage.

properties: highLight: { name: bool, displayName: bool, description: bool, priceMonthly: bool, priceYearly: bool, isActive: bool }
notes: action duoc build bang cach replace suffix _PLAN khoi audit action goc.
highLight chi cover 6 field o tren; khong bao gom currency, sortOrder, hay limits.
highLight duoc tinh theo thu tu thoi gian tang dan roi moi sort nguoc lai khi response.
ValidationException trong Subscription module tra 400 ProblemDetails.
NotFoundException tra 404 ProblemDetails.
Dung cho loi model binding/DataAnnotations tu ASP.NET Core.
Missing field required, bool/query parse sai, hoac body sai JSON shape deu co the vao shape nay.

endpoints.name: GetPlans
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu query isActive khong parse duoc thanh bool.
notes: search duoc trim + lower-case o query handler va chi match Name/DisplayName.
Khong co pagination, khong co search theo Description.
Neu khong co ban ghi hop le thi response la 200 voi mang rong.

endpoints.name: GetPlan
problemCases: 404 ProblemDetails neu plan id khong ton tai.
notes: Response luon include danh sach limits cua plan.
Backend khong tra subscriber count hay audit summary trong detail route.

endpoints.name: CreatePlan
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu body sai shape hoac vi pham DataAnnotations.
400 ProblemDetails neu name trung case-insensitive, limitType bi trung, limitValue <= 0 khi isUnlimited = false, hoac loi business rule khac.
notes: Runtime save plan truoc, sau do query lai GetPlanQuery de tra body day du limits.
Create plan khong gui email; side effect email chi xay ra o update khi gia thay doi va plan da co active subscribers.

endpoints.name: UpdatePlan
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails neu body sai shape hoac vi pham DataAnnotations.
400 ProblemDetails neu name trung, limitType bi trung, limitValue khong hop le, hoac co gang doi isActive tu true sang false trong khi van con subscriber Trial/Active/PastDue.
404 ProblemDetails neu plan id khong ton tai.
notes: Update se replace toan bo plan limits: xoa het limits cu roi insert lai danh sach moi.
Neu gia hoac currency doi va plan dang co active subscribers, backend co side effect gui email thong bao gia moi.

endpoints.name: DeletePlan
problemCases: 400 ProblemDetails neu plan van con subscriber Trial/Active/PastDue.
404 ProblemDetails neu plan id khong ton tai.
notes: Delete la soft delete: set isActive = false.
Neu plan da inactive san thi command return som va controller van tra 200 OK.
Khong co response body va khong co route hard delete.

endpoints.name: GetPlanAuditLogs
notes: Route nay khong validate plan ton tai. Neu khong co log nao thi response la 200 [].
Response cuoi cung sort CreatedDateTime desc.

runtimeRules: Plan name duoc normalize trim roi so sanh case-insensitive khi create/update.
Create/Update cho phep de limits rong; module khong bat buoc plan phai co du 8 loai limit.
Plan deactivation duoc check o ca PUT (toggle isActive) va DELETE.
DELETE plan va PUT disable deu dung ValidationException => HTTP 400, khong dung ConflictException.
Plan queries chi sort plan, khong sort limits.
GET audit logs join them thong tin user name va deserialize log snapshot thanh PlanModel.
Audit highlight hien chi map 6 field va khong diff chi tiet nested limits.
Unique constraint database co the van bao ve name, nhung handler da bat duplicate name som va throw ValidationException 400.

duplicateName400.title: Bad Request
duplicateName400.detail: Ten goi cuoc 'Pro' da ton tai.
duplicateName400.message: Ten goi cuoc 'Pro' da ton tai.

planDeactivationBlocked400.title: Bad Request
planDeactivationBlocked400.detail: Khong the ngung kich hoat goi 'Pro Plan' vi van con 5 thue bao dang hoat dong. Vui long chuyen thue bao sang goi khac truoc.
planDeactivationBlocked400.message: Khong the ngung kich hoat goi 'Pro Plan' vi van con 5 thue bao dang hoat dong. Vui long chuyen thue bao sang goi khac truoc.

relatedNotes: Self-service frontend nen uu tien GET /api/subscriptions/plans hoac GET /api/payments/plans thay vi route admin /api/plans.
Neu FE can diff plan revision chi tiet hon auditlogs highLight, can tu diff data snapshots client-side.
Khong nen dua vao order cua limits khi render editor; hay sort client-side theo enum name hoac thu tu mong muon.
